query: SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.status, o.customer_id, o.guest_phone, o.driver_id, ot.status as tracking_status, ot.notes, ot.created_at FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_tracking ot ON o.id = ot.order_id WHERE o.order_number LIKE '%1230002%' OR o.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM orders) ORDER BY ot.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.status, o.customer_id, o.guest_phone, o.driver_id, ot.status as tracking_status, ot.notes, ot.created_at FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_tracking ot ON o.id = ot.order_id WHERE o.order_number LIKE '%1230002%' OR o.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM orders) ORDER BY ot.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
